description_long: This object is a delicate flowering branch featuring two prominent white blossoms and a single bud. The flowers have broad, overlapping petals with a soft, creamy white hue and subtle hints of green and brown at the base. The petals are arranged in a whorled pattern, radiating symmetrically from the center of each bloom. The slender, brownish stem is slightly curved and supports the flowers and bud, with a few small, lanceolate leaves attached. The overall appearance is reminiscent of a magnolia or similar ornamental flower, often found in urban parks or landscaped gardens. The surface of the petals appears smooth and slightly matte, while the stem has a woody texture.
description: A slender branch with two large white flowers and a bud, featuring broad, overlapping petals and a smooth, woody stem. The blossoms are arranged symmetrically, with subtle green and brown accents at the base.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side profile of the branch, showing one open flower, a bud, and part of the stem with small leaves.
description_view_1: This view presents the flowers from a more frontal angle, displaying both open blossoms and the upright bud, emphasizing the symmetrical petal arrangement.
description_view_2: This view shows the branch at an angle, revealing the overlapping petals of both flowers and the elongated stem with attached leaves.
description_view_3: This view looks down onto the flowers, focusing on the tops of the blossoms and the close proximity of the petals.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled, radial pattern around the center of each flower, with overlapping and slightly layered petals creating a symmetrical appearance.
